title: Inventory stillbirth data sources across survey, CRVS, and facility systems
outcome: A dated source inventory separating usable, limited, and rejected stillbirth sources by measure family and policy use.
inputs: DHS or equivalent pregnancy history sources
CRVS fetal death or stillbirth guidance
facility stillbirth and perinatal audit sources
validation_method: Reviewer checks that at least six sources are classified with explicit reasons covering definition, gestational threshold, denominator, geographic grain, and ability or inability to distinguish intrapartum burden from counting gaps.
done_condition: At least six candidate sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons covering definition threshold, measure family, time reference, geographic grain, and relevance to intrapartum versus counting-system interpretation.

title: Write measure-family reconciliation note for stillbirth comparison
outcome: A reviewable note stating which stillbirth sources can and cannot be compared and for what decision.
expected_artifact: validation.md update plus short note in outputs.md.
validation_method: Domain reviewer checks that each allowed comparison names numerator, denominator, gestational threshold, and disqualifying mismatch.
done_condition: Every allowed comparison states numerator, denominator, gestational threshold, and policy question; every blocked comparison states the named mismatch that makes it invalid.

title: Select high-burden countries where stillbirth verification work is feasible
outcome: A shortlist of countries with enough public data to distinguish quality-of-care verification from counting-system strengthening.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with shortlist and explicit exclusion reasons.
validation_method: Replicator confirms the inclusion and exclusion logic on the same source set.
done_condition: At least three candidate countries are classified as feasible, borderline, or not feasible with explicit reasons tied to public data availability, comparability, and decision use.

title: Red-team misuse of stillbirth quality signals
outcome: A failure-mode review covering false negligence claims, denominator abuse, and perverse incentives in facility reporting.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with failure modes and blocked uses.
validation_method: A second reviewer reproduces the cited misuse risks from the draft artifact and confirms that mitigation language is present before publication.
done_condition: Every field-facing artifact names who could misuse facility stillbirth rates, how the misuse would happen, what blocking language or review gate prevents it, and the review is independently replicated before publication.

title: Check whether outputs match maternal-newborn planning decisions
outcome: A field-facing review of whether the pack changes a named planning or audit decision without creating reporting disincentives.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with named user, decision, timing, and non-use cases.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, service workflow, and misuse risk; a second reviewer replicates the check on the stated non-use cases before publication.
done_condition: The artifact names a real user, a real timing window, a real service or audit workflow, explicit non-use cases including non-punitive handling of facility stillbirth reporting, and the field-reality check is independently replicated before publication.
